message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first orphan reaper loop sleep (tick 292)

Migrates the orphan reaper main loop's interval sleep (orphan_reaper.rs
L86) to use `sleep_with_cx` with cancel-termination:

- `runtime_compat::sleep(Duration::from_secs(interval))` →
  `sleep_with_cx(&reaper_cx, Duration::from_secs(interval))` with
  Err-handling that logs + returns (treating cx-cancel as shutdown-
  equivalent).

`run_orphan_reaper` is spawned from `ft watch` startup to periodically
reap orphaned wezterm CLI processes. The interval is typically 60-300s.
Previously the poll was cx-insensitive — a cx-cancel at the outer
`ft watch` runtime couldn't wake the reaper task until the next
interval tick.

Now the reaper respects cx-cancel symmetrically with the
`shutdown_flag.load` check: cancel → sleep returns Err → debug log
+ return. Matches the tick 282/283/285/289 pattern of cx-cancel →
shutdown-equivalent flow.

This is the last ambient sleep in the orphan_reaper module.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 106 (187-292).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 48 (runtime 11 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 10 + workflows/runner 1
+ workflows/account_steps 1 + tx_execution 3 + simulation 1
+ workflows/wait_execution 2 + wezterm trait ext 1 + recording 2
+ wezterm poll helpers 2 + orphan_reaper 1).
main.rs cross-crate total: 192 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
